chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OPSDER SHEET SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const Petition No, D- 282 2015 ORDER WITH ISIGNATURE OF JUDGE [O Non Prosccution 21.12.2017 None present for the petitioner Same Was the position on last date of hearing It appears that this petition was filed by tne petitioner on 28.022015 and thereafter on 0432OI5 notices were ordered to be issued however the petitioner did not supply the sets and paid process fee for issuance of notices, which shows that the petitioner has in fact lost her interest in the instant petition therefore the same is dismissed for non prosecution Judge Judge AhJIL ٠٠ زره |DATE
